name: curator
title: Skill Curator
description: Search, health-check, and AI-recommend your installed Claude & Codex skills.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: search-skills
commands.title: Search Skills
commands.subtitle: Skill Curator
commands.description: Search installed Claude & Codex skills and copy their names/triggers.

commands.name: skill-doctor
commands.title: Skill Doctor
commands.subtitle: Skill Curator
commands.description: Health-check installed skills and copy fix commands.

commands.name: recommend-skills
commands.title: Recommend Skills
commands.subtitle: Skill Curator
commands.description: Describe a task; AI ranks the most relevant installed skills.

data.title: Auto (Raycast AI, fall back to custom)

preferences.name: apiBaseURL
preferences.title: Custom API Base URL
preferences.description: Your provider's OpenAI-compatible base URL — the part before /chat/completions (usually ends in /v1).

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Custom API Key
preferences.description: API key for your OpenAI-compatible provider.

preferences.name: apiModel
preferences.title: Custom Model
preferences.description: Model id for your provider, e.g. qwen3.7-max (or gpt-4o-mini, deepseek-chat, a local model name…).
